safest_plan.entry_basis: Upper 'Positive gap' zone on the 2026-06-10 hub weekly chart (~330-345), the continuation pull-back entry the 2026-05-11 live grade calls for ('pullback to VAH retest for continuation'). Exact level not stated by any source (estimated). Price is currently ~413, well above this, so this is a wait-for-pullback entry, not a buy-now level.

targets.basis: 490$ on the hub chart — the 0.705 fib marked as a magnet; also the 2025-05-21 primary TP (490)
514$ HTF SUPPLY on the hub and 2025-05-21 charts; the 2025-05-21 secondary TP (514)

safest_plan.stop_basis: Below the positive gap / value-area-low support; aligns with the 2025-05-21 invalidation ('sustained close below the double weekly order block ~320') and the 2026-05-11 'close below positive gap or VAL'.

stance_by_source.summary: Weekly chart: price has rallied off the 277-300 compound area up to ~413, right at the 412 halfway-resistance; 490 (magnet) and 514 supply are the next upside targets.
Opening-gap longs already filled; now waiting for a pull-back to the top of the range to add for continuation toward the daily high and ~500 best case.
Five-day-breaker long with a compound zone around 290-300 and previous swing highs as targets — but the attached chart image is actually an NVDA chart, so its levels can't be verified for UNH.
After a ~60% crash on the CEO-resignation and DOJ Medicare-fraud news, flagged 'discount among peak fear'; cautious entry 350-380 on a pullback, targets 464/490/514, invalid below ~320 (weak grade).

Long from $320 on the discount + defensive-sector thesis is working — TP1 and TP2 hit, running to TP3 — but explicitly says AVOID owning the underlying on Sharia grounds (conventional health insurer).

conflicts: The chart image for the 2026-04-20 mention (09-UNH.png) is actually an NVDA chart, not UNH (header reads 'NVIDIA Corporation', price 201.02) — that mention's levels are unverifiable and were excluded from the plan.

Entry timing, not direction: the cheap entries Zero named ($320, then $350-$380) are all behind us, and the newest weekly chart shows price already at the 412/0.5 resistance — so there is no fresh discounted entry on offer and buying at 413 conflicts with Zero's own buy-the-discount/pullback structure.
Sharia: zero_tg says the trade is performing but to AVOID owning the underlying (conventional insurer = gharar/riba), so the working long does not translate into a halal hold for the account.
plain_english: Every source here is on the same side — this has been a recovery bet that worked, climbing from the low-$300s peak-fear lows up to about $413 today, with the first two profit targets already hit. The problem is that $413 sits right on a known ceiling (the halfway point of the earlier crash, around $412), and all the cheap entry prices Zero flagged ($320, then $350-$380) are already behind us, so buying now means chasing into resistance for a small reward versus the risk. The cleaner move is to wait for a pull-back toward the unfilled gap around $340 and only then look to ride a continuation up toward roughly $490 and $514, with the idea cancelled if it closes back below about $320. Also note Zero's own warning that the underlying isn't Sharia-clean (a conventional health insurer), so for this account this is a watch-and-wait, not a buy.
